title: Sweet Potato Stir Fry
description: A simple and delicious stir fry recipe using sweet potatoes and a variety of vegetables.
instructions: Heat 1 tbsp of radiant oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped garlic and ginger and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Add the chopped Chinese broccoli and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes, or until tender.
Add the chopped stir fry vegetables and sweet potato and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes, or until the sweet potato is tender.
In a small bowl, whisk together the soy sauce, salt, and pepper.
Pour the soy sauce mixture over the stir-fry and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, or until the sweet potato is coated in the sauce.
Serve hot, garnished with green onions if desired.
